name: ✅ Greta Krajinka — Signature Confirm Handler
_comment: v2 — 2026-03-22: Use sourceId (Dochádzka/Pokladňa entry ID) instead of podpisId in callback_data. N8N searches podpisy by Zdroj ID + TG Chat ID to find the correct record (avoids local Memento ID vs cloud ID mismatch).

parameters.jsCode:
// Extract Telegram update from webhook body wrapper
return [{ json: $input.first().json.body }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ callback_query_id: $('Parse Callback').first().json.callbackQueryId, text: $('Parse Callback').first().json.confirmText, show_alert: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Parse Callback').first().json.chatId, message_id: $('Parse Callback').first().json.messageId, text: $('Parse Callback').first().json.originalText + '\n\n' + $('Parse Callback').first().json.confirmText + ' — ' + $('Parse Callback').first().json.fromName, parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}
